text.title: ES Agentic Pipeline Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for a pipeline-run spec — stages, accepted/rejected artefacts, review notes.

example.note: aggregate lower-case; only 2 stages; rejection flagged but review claims all passed.

antipattern.reason: Pipeline must run all 5 stages even if some are no-ops.
Internal inconsistency — review summary contradicts stage status.
Pipeline reserves opus for upstream design; per-stage codegen uses sonnet/haiku to keep cost bounded.
